text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital has a group dance lesson today, so
I've come to see how it's going.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Echo forth! Fanfare! ♪ Sprint on! Towards the
goal, I race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wooo woo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The two of us will soon see a future full of shining
stars! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wowiewowiewowie! King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...You know, Digital, you need to do more than
cheer along if you want to improve your dancing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh! S-sorry! I wasn't thinking. Old habits die hard!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. Well, you're up next. I'll check your
performance myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! N-no way... You'll only soil your precious
eyes watching me dance...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All the more reason for me to inspect you. I have
zero intention of letting someone who has taken a
lesson with moi give a lackluster performance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyah! King is looking out for me?! O-omigosh!
I-I-I can't breathe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I'll learn the dance properly and do
you proud on stage... at a winning concert...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Even if it kills me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Show me your determination!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes, ma'am! Hey, Trainer. What's the best dance
to show off my determination?
choice_data_list: Do the dance you're best at!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
R-right! I'll give that a shot! Cue the music and...
hit it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Tra la la la la! Tra la la—huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guh... If I keep struggling this much, there's no
way I can show King my determination...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No complaining! Instead, let's work on your
trouble spots first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! K-King! Ohh... keep it together, Digitan!
Don't... smile! Not... yet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Butbutbutbut... King is sooo nice... I already feel
like... 2,000% blessed! Guehuehue! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fighting to restrain her urges, Agnes Digital gets
through the group dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-in that case, I'll do the same choreography King
was just dancing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Echo forth! Fanfare! ♪ Sprint on! Towards the
goal, I race! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm?! O-oh, not too shabby...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What?! D-d-do you mean it?! Omigosh... I can't
believe I just got a compliment from King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, shall we resume the lesson? ...I won't
let myself be one-upped.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh... King's put on her serious face! I've got to film th—no! I've got to be serious. Gotta be serious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them are having a positive effect on
each other, and the dance lesson ends up being
very productive!
